title: Sharing Photos
drDigitalIntro: Share photos with family through Messages, Mail, or AirDrop (wirelessly to nearby Macs or phones). Use the Share Sheet to send photos or create a shared album that people can add to. Export photos to save copies in different formats or locations. Print photos directly from Photos. Sharing is how you preserve memories with others.

playgroundTask.question: To wirelessly share a photo with a family member in the same room, you use:

drDigitalSuccess: You shared a photo! Modern devices have built-in wireless sharing (like AirDrop or Nearby Share) — fast, direct, no internet needed.
drDigitalHint: AirDrop works like a wireless 'drop' — you drop files right onto someone else's device.
